Created attachment 174597
mount_nfs(8) - Add HISTORY

Not sure where mount_nfs first showed up, but the verison used in the BSD's originates from 4.4BSD according to CSRG archive.

Though commercial offerings from Sun and others covers older systems, eg
https://groups.google.com/forum/#!topic/net.unix-wizards/lMe7aQikqJI
